name: explain
description: Explain a piece of code or a section of the codebase at a chosen level of detail.
prompt_template:
Explain ${target} at a ${detail_level} level. Include:
- What it does and why it exists.
- Where it sits in the broader architecture (cite ATELIER.md and surrounding files).
- Any non-obvious behaviours, edge cases, or invariants.

Use concrete file paths and line numbers. Don't paraphrase the obvious — focus on the why.

args.name: target
args.description: File path, function name, or freeform description of what to explain.
